response.overview: "I am your warrior. I am your justice. And for those who have been wronged and betrayed, I am your retribution." — Donald Trump  There has never been a US president like Donald Trump — and now he's back, this time with a detailed plan for his second coming.  Nearly four years after he was cast out by voters and accused of encouraging the American people to assault their own democracy with the attack on the US Capitol, the now convicted criminal wants to rebuild the country in his own image.
response.title: Retribution
